name: Analysis quality issue
about: Report an incorrect, confusing, or low-quality repository analysis
title: "[Analysis Quality]: "
labels: analysis-quality
assignees: ""
---

## Repository pattern

What kind of project or file pattern did RepoLens analyze poorly?

## Evidence

Which repository-relative files are relevant?

- `path/to/file`

## Current RepoLens output

Paste the relevant part of `PROJECT_MAP.md`.

## Expected output

What should RepoLens have inferred or explained instead?

## Suggested improvement

If you have an idea, describe the heuristic, evidence path, or ranking rule that could improve this.

## Safety check

- [ ] This proposal does not require executing target repository code.
- [ ] This proposal does not require installing target repository dependencies.
- [ ] This proposal can be tested with a small local fixture.
